languages.text: {n}Тени былого величия мира — две фигуры в грязных, некогда богатых мантиях, низко кланяются вам. На груди у каждой покоится тяжелая императорская аквила, а лица скрывают безликие маски. Потускневшее золото покрывают глубокие вмятины, сажа и засохшая кровь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Тени былого величия мира — две фигуры в грязных, некогда богатых мантиях, низко кланяются вам. На груди у каждой покоится тяжелая императорская аквила, а лица скрывают безликие маски. Потускневшее золото покрывают глубокие вмятины, сажа и засохшая кровь.{/n}

{n}Тени былого величия мира — две фигуры в грязных, некогда богатых мантиях, низко кланяются вам. На груди у каждой покоится тяжелая императорская аквила, а лица скрывают безликие маски. Потускневшее золото покрывают глубокие вмятины, сажа и засохшая кровь.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The shadows of this world's former splendour — two figures in dirty, once opulent mantles bow before you. They both carry heavy Imperial Aquilas on their chests, their faces hidden by smooth expressionless masks whose faded gold is covered in dents, soot and dried blood.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Тени былого величия мира — две фигуры в грязных, некогда богатых мантиях, низко кланяются вам. На груди у каждой покоится тяжелая императорская аквила, а лица скрывают безликие маски. Потускневшее золото покрывают глубокие вмятины, сажа и засохшая кровь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The shadows of this world's former splendor — two figures in dirty, once opulent mantles bow before you. They both carry heavy imperial aquilas on their chests, their faces hidden by smooth expressionless masks whose faded gold is covered in dents, soot and dried blood.{/n}

{n}The shadows of this world's former splendor — two figures in dirty, once opulent mantles bow before you. They both carry heavy imperial aquilas on their chests, their faces hidden by smooth expressionless masks whose faded gold is covered in dents, soot and dried blood.{/n}

{n}The shadows of this world's former splendour — two figures in dirty, once opulent mantles bow before you. They both carry heavy Imperial Aquilas on their chests, their faces hidden by smooth expressionless masks whose faded gold is covered in dents, soot and dried blood.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Schatten des einstigen Glanzes dieser Welt — zwei Gestalten in schmutzigen, einst opulenten Mänteln verneigen sich vor dir. Beide tragen schwere kaiserliche Aquilas auf der Brust, ihre Gesichter sind hinter glatten, ausdruckslosen Masken verborgen, deren verblichenes Gold von Dellen, Ruß und getrocknetem Blut bedeckt ist.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The shadows of this world's former splendour — two figures in dirty, once opulent mantles bow before you. They both carry heavy Imperial Aquilas on their chests, their faces hidden by smooth expressionless masks whose faded gold is covered in dents, soot and dried blood.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les ombres de l'ancienne splendeur de ce monde — deux personnages vêtus de manteaux sales, autrefois opulents, s'inclinent devant vous. Ils portent tous deux de lourds aquilas impériaux sur la poitrine, leurs visages étant cachés par des masques lisses et inexpressifs dont l'or délavé est couvert de bosses, de suie et de sang séché.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The shadows of this world's former splendour — two figures in dirty, once opulent mantles bow before you. They both carry heavy Imperial Aquilas on their chests, their faces hidden by smooth expressionless masks whose faded gold is covered in dents, soot and dried blood.{/n}

languages.text: {n}这个世界昔日辉煌的阴影--两个身着肮脏、曾经富丽堂皇的袍子的人在你面前鞠躬。他们胸前都挂着沉重的帝国阿奎拉，面孔被光滑无表情的面具遮住，褪色的金色面具上布满了凹痕、烟灰和干涸的血迹。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The shadows of this world's former splendour — two figures in dirty, once opulent mantles bow before you. They both carry heavy Imperial Aquilas on their chests, their faces hidden by smooth expressionless masks whose faded gold is covered in dents, soot and dried blood.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Las sombras del antiguo esplendor de este mundo: dos figuras vestidas con sucios mantos, antaño opulentos, se inclinan ante ti. Ambos portan pesadas Aquilas Imperiales sobre sus pechos, sus rostros ocultos por lisas máscaras inexpresivas cuyo oro descolorido está cubierto de abolladuras, hollín y sangre seca.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The shadows of this world's former splendour — two figures in dirty, once opulent mantles bow before you. They both carry heavy Imperial Aquilas on their chests, their faces hidden by smooth expressionless masks whose faded gold is covered in dents, soot and dried blood.{/n}

languages.text: {n}かつて栄華を誇ったこの世界の影--汚れた、かつては豪奢なマントに身を包んだ2人の人物が、あなたの前にお辞儀をする。二人とも胸に重い帝国のアクィラを抱え、その顔は滑らかな無表情マスクで隠されている。その色あせた金色は、へこみ、すす、乾いた血で覆われている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The shadows of this world's former splendour — two figures in dirty, once opulent mantles bow before you. They both carry heavy Imperial Aquilas on their chests, their faces hidden by smooth expressionless masks whose faded gold is covered in dents, soot and dried blood.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bu dünyanın eski ihtişamının gölgeleri — kirli, bir zamanlar zengin mantolar giymiş iki figür önünüzde eğiliyor. Her ikisi de göğüslerinde ağır İmparatorluk Aquila'ları taşıyor, yüzleri soluk altın rengi ezik, is ve kurumuş kanla kaplı pürüzsüz ifadesiz maskelerle gizlenmiş.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The shadows of this world's former splendour — two figures in dirty, once opulent mantles bow before you. They both carry heavy Imperial Aquilas on their chests, their faces hidden by smooth expressionless masks whose faded gold is covered in dents, soot and dried blood.{/n}
